findings.message: Выбрана проблема долгих GC пауз, требуется tuning tail latency.

recommendations.title: Reduce GC p95 pause
recommendations.rationale: p95 pause is above profile threshold.
rollback_plan: Rollback to previous JVM option set if SLA worsens.
notes: Collect GC logs for 30-60 minutes after rollout.
Tune G1 pause target and initiating occupancy.
Compare p95 and p99 against baseline.
